subcodes.first_line: All praise be unto the Lord of existence and the Sovereign of the seen and unseen, Who hath adorned thee with a name that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک وجود و سلطان غیب و شهود را لایق و سزا که ترا مزین فرمود باسمیکه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
